name: Diamond Genesis Drop #03 — Treasury Mandate
description:
The 50% yield / 25% rewards / 15% ops / 10% liquidity split that governs every dollar Diamond ever takes in. Holders see live treasury composition and the 2-of-3 multisig signers.

Unlockable perk: Quarterly treasury statement with multisig tx links.

Membership access only. No revenue claims, no profit sharing. Educational and community-utility content. See docs/UTILITY-PERKS.md.
